title: Denny Solomona
extract: Denny Solomona (born 27 September 1993) is a former professional rugby footballer who played rugby union as a winger for  England at international level. He previously played rugby union for Sale Sharks in Premiership Rugby and played rugby league as a winger for the Melbourne Storm Under-20s, London Broncos and the Castleford Tigers. He played for Samoa at international rugby league.
